description: April 28, 2026, the White House posted a photo of President Trump and King Charles III as “Two Kings” on X. Now on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — Two Kings (2KINGS) draws from this historic UK–USA moment. 2KINGS delivers instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fees, and AI contract capability to its holders, traders, and users, making it an unstoppable and community-driven digital asset worldwide.
name: Two Kings
